name: AUZY
description: AUZY est une Plateforme d’accompagnement médico-psycho-social, Soutien psychologique et orientation parentale, pour but d’organiser une prise en charge personnalisée pour les enfants autistes et  les enfants ayant des troubles neurodéveloppementaux et la santé mentale infantiles.

#  Auzy Mental Health
![](https://dharab.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/auzy-logo.png)
[![](https://flagcdn.com/120x90/tn.png)](https://dharab.com/companies/?_sft_cat_country=tn&external=1 "See other companies in Tunisia")

[](https://www.facebook.com/AuzyMH/)[](https://www.linkedin.com/company/auzy-mental-health/)[](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCncuqjnSIivvsx9cuQfIw3w)
Sections [Mental Health](https://dharab.com/companies/?_sft_cat_section=mental-health&external=1)
![Auzy Mental Health](https://dharab.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/auzy-ico.png)
Auzy Mental Health is an online platform that allows parents to diagnose and treat their children suffering from psychological, neurodevelopmental, and behavioral disorders. To that end, it offers personalized monitoring, online diagnostics, and 24/7 support — guiding parents from pregnancy and integrating tools such as a mood journal, progress tracking, and therapeutic exercises. The company's website also provides information on various conditions it addresses, including hyperactivity, intellectual disability, autism, and dyslexia. There are online tests supported by artificial intelligence to assess children's health as well as advice for parents on managing these conditions or recognizing potential signs.
